heading: Effect of defective execution
label: 26 Effect of defective execution
text: Any document to be filed in the Patent and Trademark Office and which is required by any law, rule, or other regulation to be executed in a specified manner may be provisionally accepted by the Director despite a defective execution, provided a properly executed document is submitted within such time as may be prescribed.
notes: Amendments2002— made technical correction to directory language of . See 1999 Amendment note below.Pub. L. 107–273Pub. L. 106–1131999—, as amended by , substituted “Director” for “Commissioner”.Pub. L. 106–113Pub. L. 107–2731975— substituted “Patent and Trademark Office” for “Patent Office”.Pub. L. 93–596
